response.justification: Bogdan is a capable individual contributor with genuine distributed-systems depth and a broad polyglot background, but the resume shows no executive or organizational leadership experience of any kind — no team scaling, no hiring authority, no board-level communication, and no evidence of managing even a small engineering team. His AI and agentic-systems exposure is confined to his current role started in April 2025 (roughly one month at time of evaluation), which does not constitute the production multi-agent track record the role demands. The CTO position requires demonstrated leadership of growing engineering organizations, deep fintech-infrastructure familiarity, and years of production AI-system operation — none of which are substantiated in this profile.
strengths: 15+ years of backend and distributed-systems work including high-throughput, low-latency microservices handling millions of requests per second at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby
Broad polyglot and platform breadth (Node.js, TypeScript, DLang, C++, Swift, embedded, mobile, cloud) with hands-on DevOps and CI/CD ownership
Recent engagement with agentic AI tooling and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, signaling directional awareness of the target domain
concerns: All roles are individual-contributor; no evidence of team management, organizational design, hiring authority, or scaling an engineering org from any size to any other size
Agentic AI and LLM production experience is limited to approximately one month in the current role — far below the demonstrated multi-agent production requirement

Fintech-infrastructure depth is superficial: the RIDE Capital stint was brief and scope-limited, with no documented work in credit systems, payment flows, risk modeling, or multi-jurisdictional compliance
